name_en: M25445 Light Pink Ostrich. Inspired by Louis Vuitton trunks, this Slim Trunk handbag features a nailhead border and metal S-lock clasp on ostrich leather, showcasing an avant-garde rock style. The shiny chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering multiple carrying options. 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)
